creator: roam@ringlet.net
text:
On Sun, Mar 23, 2014 at 10:31:42PM +0000, Allan Jude wrote:
> 
> >Number:         187872
> >Category:       docs
> >Synopsis:       [patch] Add EuroBSDCon 2014 to the events list
[snip]
> >Description:
> Add EuroBSDCon 2014 (in Sophia, Bulgaria) to the events list
[snip]
> +    <location>
> +      <country code="BG">Bulgaria</country>
> +      <city>Sophia</city>
> +      <site>InterExpo Congress Center</site>
> +    </location>

Hm, just a note: I do believe that the official transcription of our
capital's name in Latin script is "Sofia", not "Sophia".

Other than that, thanks for giving this event more visibility! :)

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
Peter Pentchev	roam@ringlet.net roam@FreeBSD.org p.penchev@storpool.com
PGP key:	http://people.FreeBSD.org/~roam/roam.key.asc
Key fingerprint 2EE7 A7A5 17FC 124C F115  C354 651E EFB0 2527 DF13
This sentence every third, but it still comprehensible.
